title: trifolium tomentosum subsp. bullatum
intro: Trifolium tomentosum subsp. bullatum, also known as the woolly false clover, is a subspecies of the Trifolium tomentosum plant, a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Trifolium tomentosum subsp. bullatum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
